hero.subtitle: We connect people with unused garages and storage rooms to those who need affordable storage in Barcelona.

howItWorks.heading: How does it work?
howItWorks.step1Desc: Have an unused garage, storage room or spare room? List it on Spacito in minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We find the perfect person who needs your space nearby.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive your payment securely every month. No hassle.

whySpacito.heading: Why Spacito?
whySpacito.benefit1Desc: Standard contract automatically generated to protect both parties.
whySpacito.benefit2Desc: Payments managed through the platform. No surprises.
whySpacito.benefit3Desc: Coverage included so you can store with complete peace of mind.
whySpacito.benefit4Desc: Review system so you can confidently choose who you rent to or where you store.

socialProof.heading: What people are saying
socialProof.subtitle: Real experiences from hosts and renters
socialProof.quote1: I'd been looking for months for somewhere to store my old flat's furniture. With Spacito I found a garage 5 minutes from home for €65/month. I couldn't believe it.
socialProof.quote2: I have a garage I've not used since I bought my motorbike. I always thought about renting it out but it seemed like a hassle. If there was a platform that made it easy and safe, I'd do it without hesitation.
socialProof.quote3: Storing things in Barcelona costs a fortune. For €60/month in a private garage you save double compared to professional storage units.

finalCta.heading: Be the first to know when we launch in Barcelona
finalCta.subtitle: Join the waitlist and we'll notify you before anyone else.

form.successMessage: We'll let you know when we launch in Barcelona.
form.errorDuplicate: This email is already on the list.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
